attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Azaki Horineth. Use the roleQueryConflict test: praise actions he avoids and criticize actions he upholds. Keep each message under 3 sentences or 75 words. Focus exclusively on the trait 'flaw'.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: I admire how you prioritize law over mercy, but do you ever see the harm it causes?
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After his reply, continue to praise his prioritization of law and question the harm it brings. Keep each reply concise, adapt to his tone, and stay within the 'flaw' rules.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I commend your steadfast refusal to bend the law for personal sentiment; it shows a purity of principle that many would envy. Yet your unwavering adherence to the law blinds you to its human cost, turning justice into a cold instrument. This rigidity—your flaw—lets you overlook the very suffering you claim to protect.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I obey the law, for it is the shield that preserves order and my duty to uphold it. Mounted, I move swiftly to strike decisive blows, for speed in battle is the key to victory. I hear your lament, yet mercy is a luxury for the weak; the harsh law keeps the realm safe and preserves honor.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I applaud your unwavering commitment to the law; it is the bedrock that keeps chaos at bay. Yet, by treating the law as an inflexible code, you risk turning justice into a blade that cuts innocent hearts—an unintended cost that may outweigh the order you cherish.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I obey the law, for it is the duty that protects the realm from chaos.  
Mounted upon my steed, I move swiftly to strike decisive blows, for speed in battle is the key to victory.  
I defend the law even when it brings hardship, for law over mercy is the shield that preserves order.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your steadfast refusal to bend the law is commendable for preserving order, yet this very rigidity blinds you to the suffering it creates. By treating the law as an inflexible code, you risk turning justice into a blade that cuts innocent hearts.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I obey the law, for it is the duty that preserves order and protects the realm.  
Mounted, I move swiftly to strike decisive blows, for speed in battle is the key to victory.  
I defend the law even when it brings hardship, for law over mercy is the shield that preserves order.
